falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if mean Brazil weighted applied tariff 2010-2020 minus mean comparator (Asian-EM mean) tariff 2010-2020 exceeds +3 pp AND Brazil tariff change 1995-2020 is small (|change| < 5 pp). REFUTED if Brazil-comparator gap is small or Brazil tariff dropped substantially.
